title: A natural depsipeptide antibiotic binds the E-site of the bacterial ribosome
source: Nature
abstract: A key challenge in addressing the antibiotic resistance crisis is identifying new antimicrobial compounds1. Although natural products produced by fungi and bacteria, particularly actinomycetes, have been the source of most antibiotics discovered over the past 80 years, they have fallen out of favour owing to the frequent rediscovery of known drug scaffolds2. The current perception is that antibiotic-producing actinomycetes have been over-mined and possess little novelty left to yield. Here we demonstrate that by using improved fractionation approaches that enrich previously overlooked minor products, even well-studied strains of antibiotic-producing actinomycetes can provide new chemical scaffolds with unique modes of action. By fractionating a library of natural product extracts from soil bacteria, we show that Streptomyces rimosus, the source of the well-known antibiotic oxytetracycline, produces a cyclic depsipeptide antibiotic that we call manikomycin. Manikomycin can kill multidrug-resistant Enterobacteriaceae and is not susceptible to resistance associated with clinically used antibiotics. Biochemical, genetic and structural analyses reveal that manikomycin binds in the E-site of the large subunit of the bacterial ribosome, preventing entry of the 3′ end of the tRNA into the E-site and effectively hindering the translocation step of protein synthesis in a sequence-context-specific manner. Manikomycin is the first antibacterial agent, to our knowledge, to target the critical but underexplored E-site in the large ribosomal subunit, highlighting its value as a lead for developing new antibiotics.
title_zh: 天然缩酚肽抗生素结合细菌核糖体的 E 位点
abstract_zh: 解决抗生素耐药性危机的一个关键挑战是确定新的抗菌化合物1。尽管真菌和细菌（特别是放线菌）产生的天然产物是过去 80 年来发现的大多数抗生素的来源，但由于已知药物支架的频繁重新发现，它们已不再受欢迎2。目前的看法是，产生抗生素的放线菌已被过度开采，几乎没有什么新奇的东西可以产出。在这里，我们证明，通过使用改进的分馏方法来丰富以前被忽视的次要产物，即使是经过充分研究的产生抗生素的放线菌菌株也可以提供具有独特作用模式的新化学支架。通过对土壤细菌中的天然产物提取物文库进行分级分离，我们发现，众所周知的抗生素土霉素的来源——裂缘链霉菌（Streptomyces rimosus）可以产生一种环状缩酚肽抗生素，我们称之为马尼科霉素。马尼科霉素可以杀死多重耐药肠杆菌科细菌，并且不易受到与临床使用的抗生素相关的耐药性的影响。生化、遗传和结构分析表明，Manikomycin 结合在细菌核糖体大亚基的 E 位点上，阻止 tRNA 的 3' 端进入 E 位点，并以序列上下文特异性的方式有效阻碍蛋白质合成的易位步骤。据我们所知，Manikomycin 是第一种针对大核糖体亚基中关键但尚未充分研究的 E 位点的抗菌剂，凸显了其作为 d 药物的先导价值。

title: Genome-wide modelling of plant transcription factor binding captures regulatory variants associated with phenotypic traits
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The sequence-specific recognition of cis-regulatory elements (CRE) by transcription factors (TF) propagates genotype information to phenotypes. Understanding how genetic variation affects gene regulation remains limited by the diversity and complexity of CRE interactions. Here, we address this challenge using an explainable multi-label deep learning model trained on A. thaliana DNA-binding data to capture how CRE sequence, their broader sequence context, and syntax influence TF occupancy. Once trained, the model annotates cistrome-wide TF-binding sites and uncovers condition-specific regulatory syntax. By integrating genomic and GWAS data from A. thaliana, our approach predicts differential TF-binding and identifies regulatory gene variants within quantitative trait loci. Experimental validation highlights the link between cis-regulatory variation, gene expression, and phenotypic outcomes. Finally, applying our model to untargeted DNA binding assays in Z. mays under heat-stress conditions demonstrates its potential to characterize condition-responsive TF binding in phylogenetically distant crops.
title_zh: 植物转录因子结合的全基因组建模捕获与表型性状相关的调控变异
abstract_zh: 转录因子 (TF) 对顺式调控元件 (CRE) 的序列特异性识别将基因型信息传播为表型。了解遗传变异如何影响基因调控仍然受到 CRE 相互作用的多样性和复杂性的限制。在这里，我们使用在拟南芥 DNA 结合数据上训练的可解释的多标签深度学习模型来应对这一挑战，以捕获 CRE 序列、其更广泛的序列上下文和语法如何影响 TF 占用。经过训练后，该模型会注释顺反子范围内的 TF 结合位点并揭示特定条件的调控语法。通过整合拟南芥的基因组和 GWAS 数据，我们的方法可以预测差异 TF 结合并识别数量性状基因座内的调控基因变异。实验验证强调了顺式调控变异、基因表达和表型结果之间的联系。最后，将我们的模型应用于热应激条件下玉米的非靶向 DNA 结合测定，证明了其在系统发育较远的作物中表征条件响应 TF 结合的潜力。

title: Flipping antimicrobial peptides in the exit tunnel of the bacterial ribosome
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Proline-rich antimicrobial peptides (PrAMPs) kill bacteria by binding in the ribosomal nascent peptide exit tunnel. Type II PrAMPs bind in an orientation matching that of the nascent protein, trap the release factors and arrest ribosomes at stop codons. Conversely, Type I PrAMPs bind in an opposite orientation: their N-terminus invades the peptidyl transferase center arresting translation at start codons. Here, by mining the genome databases, we identify a number of PrAMPs with high sequence similarity to the Type II PrAMP Drosocin. Notably, many of the new PrAMPs do not stall ribosomes at stop codons, but act as Type I PrAMPs arresting translation at start codons. Structural analysis shows that such peptides bind with a Type I orientation. Minimal alterations in the peptide structure can flip the orientation of the PrAMP in the exit tunnel, switching the mechanism of translation inhibition. Altering the mode of binding and action of a PrAMP by only few mutations could be exploited by the host to combat newly emerging bacterial pathogens.
title_zh: 在细菌核糖体出口隧道中翻转抗菌肽
abstract_zh: 富含脯氨酸的抗菌肽 (PrAMP) 通过与核糖体新生肽出口通道结合来杀死细菌。 II 型 PrAMP 以与新生蛋白质相匹配的方向结合，捕获释放因子并将核糖体捕获在终止密码子处。相反，I 型 PrAMP 以相反的方向结合：它们的 N 末端侵入肽基转移酶中心，在起始密码子处阻止翻译。在这里，通过挖掘基因组数据库，我们鉴定了许多与 II 型 PrAMP Drosocin 具有高度序列相似性的 PrAMP。值得注意的是，许多新的 PrAMP 不会在终止密码子处阻止核糖体，而是充当 I 型 PrAMP 在起始密码子处阻止翻译。结构分析表明此类肽以 I 型方向结合。肽结构的最小改变可以翻转出口通道中 PrAMP 的方向，从而切换翻译抑制机制。仅通过少量突变改变 PrAMP 的结合和作用模式就可以被宿主用来对抗新出现的细菌病原体。

title: Teosinte alleles enhance nitrogen assimilation and seed protein in maize
source: Nature
abstract: During maize (Zea mays L.) domestication, seed protein content sharply declined1,2. In plants, glutamine and asparagine levels are closely correlated with protein content3,4. Asparagine is synthesized from glutamine, a process catalysed by asparagine synthase5. Teosinte harbours a superior haplotype of asparagine synthase 4 (ASN4)2. Here, we report that teosinte also possesses a superior haplotype gene promoting glutamine synthesis. We identify and clone teosinte high protein 3 (THP3), which encodes glutamate-oxaloacetate transaminase 1 (GOT1), a key enzyme involved in nitrogen assimilation and carbon–nitrogen balance. The superior THP3-T allele, subjected to negative selection during domestication, has natural variations that boost both its expression and enzymatic activity. Overexpressing THP3-T, but not the modern THP3-B allele, significantly increases seed protein, representing altered carbon–nitrogen composition. Pyramiding THP3-T with THP9-T (the latter encoding asparagine synthase 4 (ASN4)) synergistically elevates both seed and whole-plant protein in elite hybrids while maintaining yield. Our findings demonstrate a powerful strategy for crop improvement by reintroducing beneficial rare alleles disfavoured during domestication from wild relatives.
title_zh: 类蜀黍等位基因增强玉米的氮同化和种子蛋白质
abstract_zh: 在玉米 (Zea mays L.) 驯化过程中，种子蛋白质含量急剧下降1,2。在植物中，谷氨酰胺和天冬酰胺水平与蛋白质含量密切相关3,4。天冬酰胺由谷氨酰胺合成，这一过程由天冬酰胺合酶 5 催化。类蜀黍具有天冬酰胺合酶 4 (ASN4)2 的高级单倍型。在这里，我们报道类蜀黍还拥有促进谷氨酰胺合成的优质单倍型基因。我们鉴定并克隆了类蜀黍高蛋白 3 (THP3)，它编码谷氨酸-草酰乙酸转氨酶 1 (GOT1)，这是一种参与氮同化和碳氮平衡的关键酶。优良的 THP3-T 等位基因在驯化过程中受到负选择，具有增强其表达和酶活性的自然变异。过表达 THP3-T（而非现代 THP3-B 等位基因）显着增加种子蛋白质，代表碳氮组成发生改变。 THP3-T 与 THP9-T（后者编码天冬酰胺合酶 4 (ASN4)）的金字塔化可协同提高良种杂种中的种子和全株蛋白质，同时保持产量。我们的研究结果证明了通过重新引入野生近缘种驯化过程中不受欢迎的有益稀有等位基因来改良作物的强大策略。

title: Sign language narrative reveals universal and modality-specific features of cortical timescale hierarchy
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Human languages are unique in their capacity to tell stories. Prior neuroimaging studies show that spoken language narrative comprehension engages a neural time-scale hierarchy, from words and sentences to narratives. Sign languages share core features with spoken languages but also have modality-specific elements such as use of hands, face and spatial position to convey meaning and mark grammar. Here, we use naturalistic fMRI to examine which aspects of the language hierarchy are speech-specific versus modality-general. Native signers (n = 20) watched a 20-minute Polish Sign Language interpretation of The Fall of the House of Usher and its progressively scrambled versions during fMRI. We show that signed narratives synchronize hierarchical neural networks, revealing a modality-invariant dissociation between frontotemporal regions, which track sentence-level structure, and the Default Mode Network tracking plot. We identify two signatures not previously reported for speech: the superior parietal cortex synchronizes at long discourse timescales, while the ventral occipital cortex responds to word- and sentence-level processing. These results reveal both universal and potentially modality-specific aspects of language neurobiology.
title_zh: 手语叙事揭示了皮质时间尺度层次结构的普遍性和特定模态特征
abstract_zh: 人类语言在讲述故事的能力上是独一无二的。先前的神经影像学研究表明，口语叙事理解涉及从单词和句子到叙事的神经时间尺度层次结构。手语与口语具有共同的核心特征，但也具有特定的模态元素，例如使用手、面部和空间位置来传达含义和标记语法。在这里，我们使用自然主义功能磁共振成像来检查语言层次结构的哪些方面是特定于语音的，哪些是通用的。母语手语者 (n = 20) 在功能磁共振成像期间观看了 20 分钟的波兰手语解释《厄舍屋的倒塌》及其逐渐打乱的版本。我们表明，签名叙事同步分层神经网络，揭示了跟踪句子级结构的额颞叶区域与默认模式网络跟踪图之间的模态不变分离。我们确定了之前未报道过的两个语音特征：上顶叶皮层在长话语时间尺度上同步，而腹侧枕叶皮层对单词和句子级别的处理做出反应。这些结果揭示了语言神经生物学的普遍性和潜在的特定模态方面。

title: Genetic architecture of white matter microstructure captured by unsupervised deep representation learning of fractional anisotropy maps
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Fractional anisotropy (FA) from diffusion MRI is a widely used marker of white matter (WM) integrity, but conventional FA-based genetic studies typically rely on tract- or atlas-defined averages that may obscure spatially distributed WM variation and limit genetic discovery. Here, we propose a deep learning framework, termed unsupervised deep representation of WM (UDR-WM), which uses voxel-wise FA maps to derive brain-wide unsupervised deep imaging phenotypes (UDIP-FA) without prior anatomical assumptions. Compared with traditional FA phenotypes, UDIP-FA shows greater sensitivity to aging and substantially higher SNP-based heritability. Multivariate GWAS identified 939 lead SNPs across 586 loci, mapping to 3,480 UDIP-FA-associated genes. These genes are enriched in glial cells, especially astrocytes and oligodendrocytes, and form disease-relevant modules in protein interaction and co-expression networks implicating myelination and axonal structure. UDIP-FA is genetically associated with multiple brain disorders, cognitive traits, and polygenic risk. Together, our results suggest that UDIP-FA provides a biologically meaningful view of white matter, complementing conventional ROI-based FA measures and offering a more refined way to study its genetic architecture.
title_zh: 通过分数各向异性图的无监督深度表示学习捕获的白质微结构的遗传结构
abstract_zh: 扩散 MRI 的分数各向异性 (FA) 是白质 (WM) 完整性的广泛使用的标记，但基于 FA 的传统遗传研究通常依赖于纤维束或图谱定义的平均值，这可能会掩盖空间分布的 WM 变异并限制遗传发现。在这里，我们提出了一种深度学习框架，称为 WM 无监督深度表示（UDR-WM），它使用体素 FA 图来导出全脑无监督深度成像表型（UDIP-FA），而无需事先进行解剖假设。与传统的 FA 表型相比，UDIP-FA 对衰老表现出更高的敏感性，并且基于 SNP 的遗传力显着提高。多变量 GWAS 确定了 586 个位点的 939 个先导 SNP，映射到 3,480 个 UDIP-FA 相关基因。这些基因在神经胶质细胞中富集，特别是星形胶质细胞和少突胶质细胞，并在涉及髓鞘形成和轴突结构的蛋白质相互作用和共表达网络中形成与疾病相关的模块。 UDIP-FA 在遗传上与多种脑部疾病、认知特征和多基因风险相关。总之，我们的结果表明 UDIP-FA 提供了具有生物学意义的白质视图，补充了传统的基于 ROI 的 FA 测量，并提供了一种更精细的方法来研究其遗传结构。

title: Pervasive convergent evolution of sperm conjugation across the Arthropoda tree of life
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Theory suggests that ejaculates should evolve heightened functionality through integration of their component parts: spermatozoa, seminal fluid, and ejaculate structures. Here, we exhaustively review the vast literature on sperm ultrastructure in arthropods to examine sperm conjugation - a form of social cooperation among sperm - and its relationship with an ostensible antecedent: membrane-bound, extracellular sperm-associated material (SAM). Our reconstructions suggest that sperm conjugation first arose on the branch leading to insects and remipedes during the Cambrian or Ordovician Periods (i.e., 452.6 – 508.5 million years ago). Since then, arthropods and related ecdysozoans have spent an estimated two-thirds of their time with sperm conjugation, which has been evolutionarily lost and gained approximately 45 times each. We show that most evolutionary derivations of conjugation occurred following the origin of SAM, with SAM subsequent diversifying to facilitate the evolution of multiple conjugate types. Finally, comparative analyses of proteomes of the convergently-derived spermatostyles (specialized rods of SAM to which sperm attach) of true bugs and beetles indicate parallel utilization of a common genetic toolkit that may draw upon deep homology for the evolution of complex ejaculate adaptations. Our analyses reveal an ancient, pervasive and dynamic history of evolutionary experimentation with ejaculate form and function.
title_zh: 节肢动物生命树中精子结合的普遍趋同进化
abstract_zh: 理论表明，射精应该通过其组成部分（精子、精液和射精结构）的整合而进化出增强的功能。在这里，我们详尽地回顾了有关节肢动物精子超微结构的大量文献，以研究精子结合（精子之间的一种社会合作形式）及其与表面上的前因：膜结合的细胞外精子相关物质（SAM）的关系。我们的重建表明，在寒武纪或奥陶纪（即 452.6 – 5.085 亿年前），精子结合首先出现在导致昆虫和足足类的分支上。从那时起，节肢动物和相关的蜕皮动物估计有三分之二的时间都花在精子接合上，而精子接合在进化过程中各有大约 45 次的消失和获得。我们表明，大多数缀合的进化衍生发生在 SAM 起源之后，SAM 随后多样化以促进多种缀合类型的进化。最后，对真正的虫子和甲虫的会聚衍生的精子样式（精子附着的 SAM 的特殊杆）的蛋白质组的比较分析表明，共同的遗传工具包的并行利用可能会利用深度同源性来实现复杂的射精适应的进化。我们的分析揭示了射精形式和功能的进化实验的古老、普遍和动态的历史。

title: Diversity-driven biochemical survey reveals widespread dimerization throughout the rubisco superfamily
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Rubisco is the entry point of nearly all organic carbon into the biosphere and is present in all domains of life. Despite its global importance, biochemical studies of this enzyme superfamily have been limited to a relatively narrow set of subclades. Recent advances in metagenomics have dramatically reshaped our understanding of both microbial and rubisco diversity; however, biochemical characterization of these sequences has not kept pace with the exponential growth in sequence data. To better survey the functional and structural diversity of rubisco, we systematically sample and synthesize a library of diverse rubisco sequences with an emphasis on clades that are sparsely represented in the biochemical literature. Our updated phylogenetic analysis reveals that many deep‑branching rubiscos assemble as dimers, supporting a dimeric origin for the superfamily — in contrast to the ecologically dominant hexadecameric form I. Additionally, we discover and structurally characterize an unusually large catalytic subunit among characterized rubiscos, originating from a early-branching subclade with secondary structural elements not present in canonical rubisco architectures.
title_zh: 多样性驱动的生化调查揭示了整个 rubisco 超家族中广泛的二聚化
abstract_zh: Rubisco 是几乎所有有机碳进入生物圈的入口点，存在于生命的各个领域。尽管其具有全球重要性，但对该酶超家族的生化研究仅限于相对狭窄的一组分支。宏基因组学的最新进展极大地重塑了我们对微生物和 Rubisco 多样性的理解。然而，这些序列的生化特征并没有跟上序列数据的指数增长。为了更好地研究 rubisco 的功能和结构多样性，我们系统地采样并合成了不同 rubisco 序列的文库，重点关注生化文献中很少出现的进化枝。我们更新的系统发育分析表明，许多深分支的 rubisco 组装为二聚体，支持超家族的二聚体起源 - 与生态上占主导地位的十六聚体形式 I 形成鲜明对比。此外，我们发现并在结构上表征了特征性 rubiscos 中异常大的催化亚基，该亚基源自早期分支子分支，其二级结构元素不存在于典型的 rubisco 结构中。

title: Non-coding structural variants disrupt FOXG1 transcriptional regulation in early neurodevelopment
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The FOXG1 transcription factor is a crucial regulator of embryonic brain development. Pathogenic FOXG1 variants cause FOXG1 syndrome. Although structural variants in the non-coding region downstream of FOXG1 have been reported in 38 individuals with similar characteristics, the regulatory pathomechanisms remain unknown. Here, we identify two non-coding structural variants in individuals with FOXG1 syndrome-like features, allowing us to delineate a ~ 124 kb commonly affected regulatory region. Using epigenomic profiling and in vivo enhancer assays, we characterize and validate regulatory elements within the commonly affected regulatory region and wider FOXG1 TAD. We see strong activation of previously validated forebrain enhancers, and identify an enhancer cluster and progenitor-specific enhancer region that are strongly activated during forebrain-directed neural progenitor cell differentiation, a process in which FOXG1 is an important regulator. Perturbation of these elements results in varying degrees of reduced FOXG1 transcription in forebrain neural progenitor cells and in population shifts within these cells, while removal of the TAD boundary leads to aberrant expression of the neighbouring PRKD1 gene. Our findings characterize enhancer and architectural elements essential for proper FOXG1 transcription during neurodevelopment, therefore improving variant interpretation in this region.
title_zh: 非编码结构变异破坏早期神经发育中的 FOXG1 转录调控
abstract_zh: FOXG1 转录因子是胚胎大脑发育的重要调节因子。致病性 FOXG1 变异会导致 FOXG1 综合征。尽管 FOXG1 下游非编码区的结构变异已在 38 个具有相似特征的个体中报道，但其调节病理机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们在具有 FOXG1 综合征样特征的个体中鉴定出两种非编码结构变异，使我们能够描绘出约 124 kb 的常见受影响的调节区域。使用表观基因组分析和体内增强子测定，我们表征并验证了常见受影响的调控区域和更广泛的 FOXG1 TAD 内的调控元件。我们发现先前验证的前脑增强子被强烈激活，并鉴定出在前脑定向神经祖细胞分化过程中被强烈激活的增强子簇和祖细胞特异性增强子区域，FOXG1 是这一过程的重要调节因子。这些元件的扰动会导致前脑神经祖细胞中 FOXG1 转录的不同程度减少以及这些细胞内的群体变化，而 TAD 边界的去除会导致邻近 PRKD1 基因的异常表达。我们的研究结果描述了神经发育过程中 FOXG1 正确转录所必需的增强子和结构元件，从而改善了该区域的变异解释。

title: Heterogeneity and dynamics of DENV-specific CD8 + T cells in dengue infection
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Dengue virus (DENV) is a major global health threat, with secondary heterotypic infections potentially inducing detrimental memory immune responses. Antigen-specific CD8 + T cells contribute to both protection and pathogenicity, yet how their phenotypic heterogeneity relates to disease severity remains unclear. Here, we performed plate-based single-cell RNA sequencing of circulating DENV-specific CD8 + T cells identified by HLA tetramers loaded with DENV NS3-derived epitopes. Using tetramer binding to peptides corresponding to the currently and serologically inferred dominant previously infecting serotypes, we identify distinct CD8 + T cell subsets associated with disease severity. Asymptomatic dengue is enriched for lower tetramer binding cells with moderate cytotoxic programs, whereas dengue hemorrhagic fever is associated with high tetramer binding CX3CR1 + CD8 + T cells exhibiting enhanced expression of genes related to T cell receptor signaling and cytotoxicity. T cell receptor repertoires are similar among symptomatic cases but displayed temporal dynamics. Overall, DENV NS3-specific CD8 + T cells across disease severity and time are associated with distinct transcriptomic states and T cell receptor features.
title_zh: 登革热感染中 DENV 特异性 CD8 + T 细胞的异质性和动态
abstract_zh: 登革热病毒（DENV）是全球主要的健康威胁，继发性异型感染可能会诱发有害的记忆免疫反应。抗原特异性 CD8 + T 细胞有助于保护性和致病性，但其表型异质性与疾病严重程度的关系仍不清楚。在这里，我们对循环的 DENV 特异性 CD8 + T 细胞进行了基于平板的单细胞 RNA 测序，这些细胞是由装载有 DENV NS3 衍生表位的 HLA 四聚体鉴定的。利用与当前和血清学推断的先前感染的主要血清型相对应的肽的四聚体结合，我们鉴定了与疾病严重程度相关的不同的CD8+T细胞亚群。无症状登革热富含具有中等细胞毒性程序的低四聚体结合细胞，而登革热出血热与高四聚体结合CX3CR1 + CD8 + T细胞相关，表现出与T细胞受体信号传导和细胞毒性相关的基因表达增强。有症状病例中的 T 细胞受体库相似，但显示出时间动态。总体而言，不同疾病严重程度和时间的 DENV NS3 特异性 CD8 + T 细胞与不同的转录组状态和 T 细胞受体特征相关。

title: The need for sustaining mpox vaccination in Africa
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Sustaining and transitioning mpox vaccination requires establishing and resourcing a global mpox vaccine stockpile under the Inter-Agency Coordinating Group (ICG), supported by sustainable financing, transparent allocation criteria, diversified manufacturing (including local production in Africa), and robust logistics, surveillance, and operational systems. Moreover, it requires strengthened collaboration among global, regional, and community actors; continuous data generation and research to inform policy, including genomic and vaccine effectiveness studies; and accelerated R&D with fast-tracked local manufacturing to enhance supply resilience and long-term epidemic preparedness.
title_zh: 非洲维持MPOX疫苗接种的必要性
abstract_zh: 维持和过渡mpox疫苗接种需要在机构间协调小组（ICG）下建立全球mpox疫苗库存并为其提供资源，并得到可持续融资、透明分配标准、多元化制造（包括非洲本地生产）以及强大的物流、监测和操作系统的支持。此外，还需要加强全球、区域和社区行为者之间的合作；持续的数据生成和研究为政策提供信息，包括基因组和疫苗有效性研究；并通过快速的本地制造加速研发，以增强供应弹性和长期的流行病准备。

title: The size of tropical vegetation gross primary production
source: Nature
title_zh: 热带植被初级生产总值规模

title: Cell-type-resolved genetic variation shapes inflammatory bowel disease risk
source: Nature
abstract: Most genetic variants associated with complex diseases lie in non-coding regions1, complicating efforts to identify effector genes and relevant cell types. Here we map cis-expression quantitative trait loci (eQTLs) across 2.2 million single cells using intestinal biopsies and blood from 421 individuals, including 125 with inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). Cell-type-level eQTLs were more distal to transcription start sites, enriched in enhancers, less likely to regulate the nearest gene, and more than 3.5-fold more likely to colocalize with IBD loci detected in genome-wide association studies (GWASs) than eQTLs detected at tissue-level resolution. We nominate effector genes at more than half of known IBD loci, including MAML2, PSEN2 and ZMIZ1 in myeloid cells, implicating reduced Notch signalling in intestinal immune dysfunction. We also identify Wnt-regulated genes, including MYC, in epithelial stem and progenitor cells, suggesting that impaired renewal contributes to barrier breakdown. Our results provide a mechanistic map that links genetic risk to specific genes and cell types in IBD, and a generalized framework for interpretation of GWAS loci using single-cell eQTL mapping of disease-relevant tissues in complex diseases.
title_zh: 细胞类型决定的遗传变异影响炎症性肠病的风险
abstract_zh: 大多数与复杂疾病相关的遗传变异位于非编码区1，这使得识别效应基因和相关细胞类型的工作变得更加复杂。在这里，我们使用来自 421 名个体（其中 125 名患有炎症性肠病 (IBD)）的肠道活检和血液，绘制了 220 万个单细胞中的顺式表达数量性状位点 (eQTL)。细胞类型水平的 eQTL 距离转录起始位点更远，富含增强子，不太可能调节最近的基因，并且与全基因组关联研究 (GWAS) 中检测到的 IBD 位点共定位的可能性比组织水平分辨率检测到的 eQTL 高 3.5 倍。我们在超过一半的已知 IBD 基因座上提名了效应基因，包括骨髓细胞中的 MAML2、PSEN2 和 ZMIZ1，这表明肠道免疫功能障碍中 Notch 信号传导减少。我们还在上皮干细胞和祖细胞中鉴定出 Wnt 调节基因，包括 MYC，这表明更新受损会导致屏障破坏。我们的结果提供了一个将遗传风险与 IBD 中特定基因和细胞类型联系起来的机制图，以及使用复杂疾病中疾病相关组织的单细胞 eQTL 作图来解释 GWAS 基因座的通用框架。

title: A maize gene that coordinates flowering aids drought resistance
source: Nature
abstract: The synchronous flowering of male and female flower clusters in maize is crucial, but drought disrupts this synchrony, leading to considerable yield losses. A gene called SAUR72 is shown to preserve flowering synchrony in drought conditions, offering a potential strategy for breeding drought-resilient maize varieties. A DNA insertion in the sequence that controls the expression of the gene SAUR72 reduces drought tolerance.
title_zh: 协调开花的玉米基因有助于抗旱
abstract_zh: 玉米雄花和雌花簇的同步开花至关重要，但干旱破坏了这种同步，导致相当大的产量损失。一种名为 SAUR72 的基因被证明可以在干旱条件下保持开花同步性，为培育抗旱玉米品种提供了潜在的策略。在控制 SAUR72 基因表达的序列中插入 DNA 会降低耐旱性。

title: Ubiquitin tags detected on non-protein biomolecules using new method
source: Nature
abstract: An innovative method of mass spectrometry has detected the small protein ubiquitin on biomolecules other than proteins. In mouse liver, the energy-storing molecule glycogen has a large increase in ubiquitination — involving 1% of the liver’s total ubiquitin — during fasting, when glycogen is broken down. The results indicate that the breakdown of liver glycogen molecules into glucose might be regulated by ubiquitination.
title_zh: 使用新方法检测非蛋白质生物分子上的泛素标签
abstract_zh: 一种创新的质谱方法检测到蛋白质以外的生物分子上的小蛋白泛素。在小鼠肝脏中，禁食期间糖原被分解时，能量储存分子糖原的泛素化程度大幅增加（涉及肝脏总泛素的 1%）。结果表明，肝糖原分子分解为葡萄糖可能受到泛素化的调节。

title: Two-dimensional melt growth of large-scale, single-crystalline hybrid organic-inorganic perovskite films
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Melt growth is a process for creating large, bulk single crystals by solidifying a molten material. It combines elements of the Czochralski method, which creates a molten phase, and the Bridgman method, which controls the temperature gradient. Here, we apply two-dimensional (2D) melt growth to synthesize large-scale, single-crystal hybrid organic-inorganic perovskites (HOIPs), enabling substrate-agnostic crystallization with precise thickness control. Our method involves a vapor-liquid-solid process, where the reaction between the pre-deposited inorganic NaxPbBry seeding layer and the organic precursor flux produces the 2D molten phase of HOIPs. This molten phase spreads into a 2D liquid film and allows uniform, large-scale crystallization of ultrathin HOIPs in a substrate-agnostic manner, bypassing requirements for lattice matching. Using this approach, we successfully grow 2D (n = 1) and quasi-2D (n > 1) ferroelectric HOIP films on SiO2/Si wafers at a low thermal budget, enabling direct large-scale device fabrication. Statistical analysis of devices demonstrates reliable ferroelectric switching and uniform electronic performance across the film. Our method holds great potential for other types of HOIPs and heterostructures, paving the way for applications in large-scale on-chip devices.
title_zh: 大尺寸单晶杂化有机-无机钙钛矿薄膜的二维熔融生长
abstract_zh: 熔融生长是通过凝固熔融材料来制造大块单晶的过程。它结合了直拉法（创建熔融相）和布里奇曼法（控制温度梯度）的元素。在这里，我们应用二维（2D）熔体生长来合成大规模单晶杂化有机-无机钙钛矿（HOIP），实现与基底无关的结晶和精确的厚度控制。我们的方法涉及气-液-固过程，其中预沉积的无机 NaxPbBry 晶种层与有机前体助熔剂之间的反应产生 HOIP 的 2D 熔融相。这种熔融相扩散成二维液膜，并允许超薄 HOIP 以与基底无关的方式均匀、大规模结晶，绕过晶格匹配的要求。利用这种方法，我们成功地以低热预算在 SiO2/Si 晶圆上生长了 2D (n = 1) 和准 2D (n > 1) 铁电 HOIP 薄膜，从而实现了直接大规模器件制造。器件的统计分析表明，整个薄膜具有可靠的铁电开关和均匀的电子性能。我们的方法对于其他类型的 HOIP 和异质结构具有巨大的潜力，为大规模片上设备的应用铺平了道路。

title: Microbial autotrophy driven by extracellular electrons generated from mechanical forces via flexoelectricity
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mechanical force has recently emerged as a microbial energy source through direct mechanical-to-electrical energy conversion. However, the flexoelectric effect, a universal mechanoelectrical coupling phenomenon, remains underexplored as an energy source for microbial life. Here, we report a mechanically-driven microbial growth mechanism whereby mechanical energy is converted into electrical energy via the flexoelectric effect of a mineral. This process supports microbial growth in the absence of sunlight and chemical energy sources. Using flexoelectric manganese oxide and electroactive Rhodopseudomonas palustris as a model biohybrid, we demonstrate that mechanical force bends manganese oxide nanosheets to generate free electrical charge. R. palustris captures and utilizes this electrical energy for growth by coupling carbon fixation and denitrification in the absence of chemical electron donors under dark conditions. This pathway is accessible to various electroactive microorganisms and flexoelectric minerals. These findings reveal a noteworthy energy acquisition pathway for microbial survival in energy-limited settings, providing crucial evidence for the diversity of mechanical-to-metabolic coupling in biological processes.
title_zh: 由机械力通过挠曲电产生的细胞外电子驱动微生物自养
abstract_zh: 机械力最近通过直接机械能到电能的转换而成为一种微生物能源。然而，挠曲电效应是一种普遍的机电耦合现象，作为微生物生命的能源，仍未得到充分探索。在这里，我们报告了一种机械驱动的微生物生长机制，通过矿物的挠曲电效应将机械能转化为电能。这个过程在没有阳光和化学能源的情况下支持微生物的生长。使用柔性电氧化锰和电活性沼泽红假单胞菌作为生物杂交模型，我们证明了机械力使氧化锰纳米片弯曲以产生自由电荷。在黑暗条件下缺乏化学电子供体的情况下，沼泽红藻通过耦合碳固定和反硝化来捕获并利用这种电能进行生长。各种电活性微生物和挠电矿物质都可以进入该途径。这些发现揭示了在能量有限的环境中微生物生存的一个值得注意的能量获取途径，为生物过程中机械代谢耦合的多样性提供了重要证据。

title: AI-assisted multi-objective hole-selective contact design for perovskite photovoltaics
source: Joule
abstract: Designing functional materials for high-performance perovskite solar cells is often slow and a trial-and-error process. Here, we use surrogate-assisted multi-objective evolutionary algorithms to design molecules that improve both efficiency and stability at device interfaces. The approach identifies new molecules that enable perovskite solar cells to reach 26.9% efficiency with strong thermal stability. This work highlights how AI can accelerate the discovery of functional materials for next-generation energy technologies.
title_zh: 人工智能辅助钙钛矿光伏多目标空穴选择性接触设计
abstract_zh: 设计高性能钙钛矿太阳能电池的功能材料通常很慢，并且是一个反复试验的过程。在这里，我们使用代理辅助多目标进化算法来设计能够提高设备接口效率和稳定性的分子。该方法确定了新的分子，使钙钛矿太阳能电池的效率达到 26.9%，并且具有很强的热稳定性。这项工作强调了人工智能如何加速下一代能源技术功能材料的发现。

title: AC-native battery systems
source: Joule
abstract: AC-native battery systems reframe batteries from passive DC energy sources into active energy-processing platforms. By relocating controllable power-conversion capability inside the battery module or pack, they hold promise in enabling internal AC waveform synthesis, topology-aware current routing, enhanced state observability, controllable stress redistribution, and active fault isolation. The broader significance lies in a new architectural design space where batteries, power electronics, embedded sensing, and real-time control converge, while practical adoption remains shaped by cost, reliability, qualification, and system-level trade-offs.
title_zh: 交流原生电池系统
abstract_zh: 交流原生电池系统将电池从被动直流能源重新构建为主动能源处理平台。通过重新定位电池模块或电池组内的可控电源转换功能，它们有望实现内部交流波形合成、拓扑感知电流路由、增强的状态可观测性、可控应力重新分布和主动故障隔离。更广泛的意义在于新的架构设计空间，其中电池、电力电子、嵌入式传感和实时控制融合在一起，而实际采用仍然由成本、可靠性、资格和系统级权衡决定。

title: SuperARC: a test for artificial superintelligence based on compressed modelling, recursive prediction and problem complexity
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: We introduce an increasing-complexity, open-ended, and human-agnostic metric to evaluate foundational and frontier AI models in the context of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) and Artificial Super Intelligence (ASI) claims. Unlike other tests that rely on human-centric questions and expected answers, or on pattern-matching methods, the test here introduced is grounded on fundamental mathematical areas of randomness and optimal inference. We argue that human-agnostic metrics based on the universal principles established by Algorithmic Information Theory (AIT) formally framing the concepts of model abstraction and prediction offer a powerful metrological framework. When applied to frontiers models, the leading LLMs outperform most others in multiple tasks, but they do not always do so with their latest model versions, which often regress and appear far from any global maximum or target estimated using the principles of AIT defining a Universal Intelligence (UAI) point and trend in the benchmarking. Conversely, a hybrid neuro-symbolic approach to UAI based on the same principles is shown to outperform frontier specialised prediction models in a simplified but relevant example related to compression-based model abstraction and sequence prediction. Finally, we prove and conclude that predictive power through arbitrary formal theories is directly proportional to compression over the algorithmic space, not the statistical space, and so further AI models’ progress can only be achieved in combination with symbolic approaches that LLMs developers are adopting often without acknowledgement or realisation.
title_zh: SuperARC：基于压缩建模、递归预测和问题复杂性的人工超级智能测试
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种日益复杂的、开放式的、与人类无关的指标来评估通用人工智能 (AGI) 和超级人工智能 (ASI) 背景下的基础和前沿人工智能模型。与其他依赖于以人为中心的问题和预期答案或模式匹配方法的测试不同，这里引入的测试基于随机性和最优推理的基本数学领域。我们认为，基于算法信息论（AIT）建立的普遍原则的与人类无关的指标正式构建了模型抽象和预测的概念，提供了一个强大的计量框架。当应用于前沿模型时，领先的法学硕士在多项任务中表现优于大多数其他模型，但他们的最新模型版本并不总是能做到这一点，这些版本经常会出现倒退，并且与使用 AIT 定义通用智能 (UAI) 点和基准趋势的原则估计的任何全球最大值或目标相去甚远。相反，在与基于压缩的模型抽象和序列预测相关的简化但相关的示例中，基于相同原理的 UAI 混合神经符号方法显示出优于前沿专业预测模型的性能。最后，我们证明并得出结论，通过任意形式理论的预测能力与算法空间的压缩成正比，而不是与统计空间的压缩成正比，因此人工智能模型的进一步进步只能与法学硕士开发人员经常采用的符号方法相结合才能实现

title: Boosting ionic conductivity of single-ion conductive polyelectrolyte elastomers via high-dielectric plasticizers
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Ionic conduction plays a vital role in biological systems, energy storage and ionotronic devices. Polyelectrolyte elastomers have attracted growing interest as solid-state single-ion conductors due to their inherent ion selectivity, leakage-free nature and mechanical elasticity. However, existing polyelectrolyte elastomers have relatively low ionic conductivity (~10−3 mS cm−1), limiting their applicability as efficient ionic conductors. Here we present a materials design approach that boosts conductivity and preserves leakage-free operation by introducing a solid-state additive that combines two key characteristics: a high dielectric constant to increase dissociated ion density (n" role="presentation">nn) and a plasticizing effect to enhance ion mobility (μ" role="presentation">μ\mu). Demonstrated with succinonitrile, this approach increases conductivity by over two orders of magnitude at room temperature across both polycationic and polyanionic systems, further enhancing elasticity. By elevating conductivity across diverse polyelectrolyte networks, this work demonstrates a versatile route to achieve stable and efficient ion transport for next-generation solid-state single-ion conductors.
title_zh: 通过高介电增塑剂提高单离子导电聚电解质弹性体的离子电导率
abstract_zh: 离子传导在生物系统、能量存储和离子电子器件中发挥着至关重要的作用。聚电解质弹性体作为固态单离子导体，由于其固有的离子选择性、无泄漏性质和机械弹性而引起了越来越多的关注。然而，现有的聚电解质弹性体具有相对较低的离子电导率（~10−3 mS cm−1），限制了它们作为高效离子导体的应用。在这里，我们提出了一种材料设计方法，通过引入固态添加剂来提高电导率并保持无泄漏操作，该添加剂结合了两个关键特性：高介电常数以增加离解离子密度 (n" role="presentation">nn) 和塑化效应以增强离子迁移率 (μ" role="presentation">μ\mu)。通过丁二腈的证明，这种方法在室温下将聚阳离子和聚阴离子系统的电导率提高了两个数量级以上，进一步增强了弹性。通过提高不同聚电解质网络的电导率，这项工作展示了一种为下一代固态单离子导体实现稳定和高效离子传输的通用途径。

title: Berry pseudorotation enabled photodissociation of Fe(CO)5 observed by ultrafast electron diffraction
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The structural dynamics of metal carbonyls are central to processes ranging from catalysis to organometallic synthesis. Here we investigate the photodissociation of a prototypical transition metal carbonyl, Fe(CO)5, using mega-electron-volt ultrafast electron diffraction. By separately tracking structural evolution along the axial and equatorial directions, we provide an atomistic, angle-resolved view of the nuclear motions preceding CO dissociation and infer key features of the excited-state potential energy surface from the experimental observations. We further show that vibrational coupling before reaching the conical intersection facilitates the loss of a random carbonyl ligand via the Berry pseudorotation mechanism.
title_zh: 超快电子衍射观察到 Berry 赝旋转使 Fe(CO)5 光解离
abstract_zh: 金属羰基化合物的结构动力学是从催化到有机金属合成等过程的核心。在这里，我们使用兆电子伏超快电子衍射研究了原型过渡金属羰基 Fe(CO)5 的光解。通过分别跟踪沿轴向和赤道方向的结构演化，我们提供了 CO 解离前核运动的原子角度分辨视图，并从实验观察中推断出激发态势能表面的关键特征。我们进一步表明，到达圆锥形交叉点之前的振动耦合通过贝里假旋转机制促进了随机羰基配体的损失。

title: Engineering technology of implantable galvanic cells for silencing the bone-neural axis in gouty arthritis therapy
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Gouty arthritis faces multiple challenges, such as recalcitrance to cure and recurrent flares, owing to its intricate pathophysiological microenvironment. Recent studies have focused on urate reduction, pain relief, or anti-inflammation effects alone, which often fail to provide satisfactory results. To address these challenges, an implantable manganese platinum microscale galvanic cell (Mn@Pt micro-GC) is developed. This system utilizes the urate oxidase-like activity of platinum to degrade deposited monosodium urate crystals, while the Mn2+ and hydrogen gas work synergistically to effectively reversing the pro-inflammatory environment. In addition to decreasing the production of pain signals associated with gout, Mn@Pt micro-GC effectively inhibits pain signal transmission along the CXCL5-neuronal CXCR2-TRPA1 axis through continuous electrical stimulation. This multimodal treatment approach emphasizes the strong relationship between bone and nerve in gout, taking into account the importance of reducing uric acid, anti-inflammation, and pain relief in gout therapy, which has led to improved treatment results.
title_zh: 植入式原电池沉默骨神经轴工程技术治疗痛风性关节炎
abstract_zh: 由于其复杂的病理生理微环境，痛风关节炎面临多重挑战，例如难以治愈和反复发作。最近的研究仅关注降低尿酸、缓解疼痛或抗炎作用，但往往无法提供令人满意的结果。为了应对这些挑战，开发了一种植入式锰铂微型原电池（Mn@Pt micro-GC）。该系统利用铂的尿酸氧化酶样活性来降解沉积的尿酸钠晶体，而Mn2+和氢气协同作用，有效逆转促炎环境。除了减少与痛风相关的疼痛信号的产生外，Mn@Pt micro-GC 通过连续电刺激有效抑制沿着 CXCL5-神经元 CXCR2-TRPA1 轴的疼痛信号传输。这种多模式治疗方法强调痛风中骨骼和神经之间的紧密关系，同时考虑到降尿酸、抗炎和缓解疼痛在痛风治疗中的重要性，从而改善了治疗效果。

title: Analysis of trade-offs of post-sorting plastic packaging
source: Nature
abstract: Increasing recycling rates requires not only better technologies but also smarter collection of plastic packaging waste1. Source separation—sorting materials such as plastics and metals at the household level—captures substantial waste volumes2,3, yet significant quantities still remain in the residual household waste fraction owing to misthrows and non-participation4,5. Post-sorting of mixed waste has been proposed as a one-bin alternative to boost capture6,7, despite concerns that contamination could compromise recycling quality7,8,9. Here we show, based on samples collected from one single material recovery facility, that bale purity, expressed as percent target polymer, is similar across source-separation and post-sorting pathways, but post-sorted bales contain more contaminants, including prohibited metals such as cadmium and lead. Post-sorted samples have higher moisture and dirt content8, which can lead to increased complex volatile organic compounds and necessitate additional washing. Concentrations of metals and halogens are elevated owing to non-packaging items, potentially compromising recycling quality and further complicating both mechanical and chemical recycling processes10,11. Although post-sorting can be a useful supplement, it should not replace source separation. Our results demonstrate that post-sorting can increase feedstock for recycling, but it also acts as a pathway for certain contaminants to enter plastic packaging waste, raising concentrations above typical levels, with potential risks to human health if these contaminants are not removed before recyclate production. As post-sorting of residual waste becomes crucial to meet circularity targets, these findings are particularly relevant.
title_zh: 分选后塑料包装的权衡分析
abstract_zh: 提高回收率不仅需要更好的技术，还需要更智能地收集塑料包装废物1。源头分类——在家庭层面对塑料和金属等材料进行分类——捕获了大量废物2,3，但由于误扔和不参与4,5，残留的家庭废物部分中仍残留有大量废物4,5。尽管担心污染可能会损害回收质量7,8,9，但仍建议对混合废物进行后分类作为一种单箱替代方案来促进收集6,7。在此，我们根据从单一材料回收设施收集的样品表明，源分离和后分选途径中以目标聚合物百分比表示的捆包纯度相似，但分拣后的捆包含有更多污染物，包括镉和铅等违禁金属。分选后的样品具有较高的水分和污垢含量8，这可能导致复杂的挥发性有机化合物增加，并需要额外的清洗。由于非包装物品，金属和卤素的浓度升高，可能会影响回收质量，并使机械和化学回收过程进一步复杂化10,11。尽管后分类可以是一种有用的补充，但它不应取代源分离。我们的结果表明，后分选可以增加原料的回收利用，但它也成为某些污染物进入塑料包装废物的途径，使浓度高于典型水平，如果这些污染物在处理前没有去除，将对人类健康造成潜在风险。

title: Tracking microstructure and mechanical response
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Characterizing structural evolution alongside mechanical behaviour is challenging for micro- and nanostructured materials, highlighting the need for advancing in situ characterization techniques.
title_zh: 跟踪微观结构和机械响应
abstract_zh: 对于微米和纳米结构材料来说，表征结构演化和机械行为具有挑战性，这凸显了先进原位表征技术的必要性。

title: Double volcanic tracks at Hawaii caused by bridgmanite-enriched primordial mantle blobs
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mantle plumes, rising from Earth’s deep interior, are expected to produce a single age-progressive hotspot track. However, Hawaiian volcanoes younger than ~7 million years form two subparallel volcanic chains, the Loa and Kea trends. The mechanism behind this double-track volcanism and its connection to deep mantle reservoirs remain unresolved. Here we show that bridgmanite-enriched primordial mantle blobs (BPMBs) with intrinsic viscosities 10–30 times higher than the ambient mantle can generate bilaterally zoned plumes using three-dimensional thermochemical mantle plume models. Enhanced viscous heating within BPMBs raises plume temperatures asymmetrically, reproducing observed contrasts in isotopic composition, plume temperature, melt flux, and seismic velocity between the Loa and Kea trends. The global occurrence of similar double-track volcanism suggests that BPMBs are scattered within large low velocity provinces (LLVPs), likely remnants of an ancient basal magma ocean. Our results provide a mechanism for double-track volcanism and constraints on the structure and composition of LLVPs.
title_zh: 夏威夷的双火山迹是由富含桥锰矿的原始地幔斑点造成的
abstract_zh: 从地球内部深处升起的地幔柱预计会产生单一的年龄渐进热点轨道。然而，夏威夷火山的年龄不到 700 万年，形成了两条近平行的火山链：洛阿火山链和凯亚火山链。这种双轨火山活动背后的机制及其与深部地幔储层的联系仍未解决。在这里，我们表明，特性粘度比周围地幔高 10-30 倍的富含桥锰矿的原始地幔斑点 (BPMB) 可以使用三维热化学地幔羽流模型产生双边分区羽流。 BPMB 内增强的粘性加热不对称地提高了羽流温度，再现了 Loa 和 Kea 趋势之间观察到的同位素组成、羽流温度、熔体通量和地震速度的对比。全球范围内出现的类似双轨火山活动表明，BPMB 分散在大片低速区 (LLVP) 内，可能是古代基底岩浆海洋的残余物。我们的结果提供了双轨火山作用的机制以及对 LLVP 结构和组成的约束。

title: Rapid earthquake magnitude classification via P-wave strains from borehole strainmeters and Distributed Acoustic Sensing
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS) offers a promising approach for earthquake early warning (EEW) in settings where seismic networks are costly to maintain. By repurposing fiber optic cables as dense strainmeter arrays, DAS enables real-time earthquake detection wherever those fibers are accessible. However, poor azimuthal coverage and challenges in estimating magnitude from strain measurements remain key hurdles in applying DAS to earthquake monitoring. Here, we develop a machine learning method to distinguish moderate-to-large (defined here as M ≥ 5.4) earthquakes from smaller ones within the first 4 sec of a strain waveform after a P-wave arrival without determining the earthquake location. Using ensemble decision tree models trained on borehole strainmeter data (3.5 ≤ M ≤ 7.1) and tested on onshore DAS waveforms (including the 2024 M7 Offshore Cape Mendocino earthquake), we find that low-frequency (0.2–0.5 Hz) continuous wavelet transform coefficients are the strongest predictors of magnitude, in addition to strain amplitude. Both DAS and borehole strainmeters effectively capture long-period strain signals, making these results valuable for EEW systems. Our method shows high precision compared to the real-time EEW system, ShakeAlert®, supporting the position that DAS is a viable technology for earthquake monitoring and magnitude classification. Fiber optic cables plus machine learning could aid earthquake early warning by estimating earthquake size within the first few seconds of shaking.
title_zh: 通过钻孔应变计和分布式声学传感的 P 波应变进行快速地震震级分类
abstract_zh: 分布式声学传感 (DAS) 为地震网络维护成本高昂的环境中的地震早期预警 (EEW) 提供了一种很有前景的方法。通过将光纤电缆重新用作密集应变计阵列，DAS 可以在任何可触及光纤的地方实现实时地震检测。然而，方位角覆盖范围差以及通过应变测量估计震级的挑战仍然是将 DAS 应用到地震监测的主要障碍。在这里，我们开发了一种机器学习方法，可以在 P 波到达后应变波形的前 4 秒内区分中到大（此处定义为 M ≥ 5.4）地震和较小地震，而无需确定地震位置。使用在钻孔应变计数据 (3.5 ≤ M ≤ 7.1) 上训练并在陆上 DAS 波形（包括 2024 年 M7 海上门多西诺角地震）上进行测试的集合决策树模型，我们发现，除了应变幅度之外，低频 (0.2–0.5 Hz) 连续小波变换系数是最强的震级预测因子。 DAS 和钻孔应变计都能有效捕获长周期应变信号，使这些结果对于 EEW 系统很有价值。与实时 EEW 系统 ShakeAlert® 相比，我们的方法显示出较高的精度，支持 DAS 是地震监测和震级分类的可行技术的立场。光纤电缆加上机器学习可以通过在震动的最初几秒钟内估计地震规模来帮助地震早期预警。

title: Asymmetric attrition and secondary chromosome destabilization after double-strand breaks in human embryonic development
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: DNA repair in human embryos is poorly understood, and double-strand breaks (DSBs) can cause chromosome loss. We show that chromosomal alterations relative to an induced DSB are asymmetric: acentric arms show complementary gains and losses, while centric arms are biased toward losses. Centromeric to the cut site secondary breakage and attrition is extensive. In contrast, break sites at acentric arms are conserved with no secondary breakage. These differences reflect differential forces at the mitotic spindle. Telomeric arms detach from the pro-metaphase spindle while centric truncated chromosomes lag during anaphase, suggesting that the DSB impedes sister chromatid separation. Secondary breakage near the centromere concordant with extensive attrition at the DSB site indicates a DSB can destabilize a chromosome without end-joining of sister chromatids. These results highlight the risks of chromosomal-scale changes in CRISPR-Cas9 genome editing and show that a single DSB can destabilize a human embryo chromosome independent of fusion-breakage cycles.
title_zh: 人类胚胎发育中双链断裂后的不对称磨损和二次染色体不稳定
abstract_zh: 人们对人类胚胎中的 DNA 修复知之甚少，双链断裂 (DSB) 会导致染色体丢失。我们发现，相对于诱导 DSB 的染色体改变是不对称的：非着丝粒臂显示互补的增益和损失，而中心臂则偏向于损失。着丝粒到切割位点的二次断裂和磨损是广泛的。相比之下，非着心臂处的断裂位点得以保留，没有二次断裂。这些差异反映了有丝分裂纺锤体的不同力。端粒臂与前中期纺锤体分离，而中心截短的染色体在后期滞后，表明 DSB 阻碍姐妹染色单体分离。着丝粒附近的二次断裂以及 DSB 位点的广泛磨损表明 DSB 可以在没有姐妹染色单体末端连接的情况下破坏染色体的稳定性。这些结果强调了 CRISPR-Cas9 基因组编辑中染色体规模变化的风险，并表明单个 DSB 可以独立于融合断裂周期而破坏人类胚胎染色体的稳定性。

title: Plastoglobules compartmentalize nitrogen assimilation in maize
source: Nature
abstract: Efficient nitrogen assimilation is important for sustainable agriculture1, yet its subcellular organization remains unknown. Here we show that plastoglobules (PGs) in the chloroplasts of mesophyll cells function as a metabolic hub that orchestrates nitrogen utilization in maize. Nitrogen-responsive dynamics of PGs represent a conserved feature across plant species. We identify two key enzymes, nitrite reductase 2 (ZmNIR2) and glutamine synthetase 1 (ZmGLN1), specifically targeted to PGs by a chloroplast transit peptide and hydrophobic region. Cryogenic electron microscopy analysis of recombinant ZmGLN1 shows a decameric complex, enabling a metabolon with ZmNIR2 for enhanced efficiency. Among two NIR and six GLN enzymes, ZmNIR2 and ZmGLN1 are the primary PG-localized components that orchestrate sub-organellar nitrogen assimilation and dictate nitrogen use efficiency. Genetic variation in ZmNIR2 splicing in cultivated germplasm generates a PG-targeted isoform (ZmNIR2T1) that boosts NUE. Our work establishes PGs as a central compartment for primary nitrogen assimilation, providing a promising strategy to develop high-NUE crops for global food security.
title_zh: 质体球划分玉米中的氮同化
abstract_zh: 高效的氮同化对于可持续农业非常重要，但其亚细胞组织仍然未知。在这里，我们发现叶肉细胞叶绿体中的质体球（PG）充当协调玉米氮利用的代谢中心。 PG 的氮响应动态代表了植物物种的保守特征。我们确定了两种关键酶，亚硝酸还原酶 2 (ZmNIR2) 和谷氨酰胺合成酶 1 (ZmGLN1)，它们通过叶绿体转运肽和疏水区域专门针对 PG。重组 ZmGLN1 的低温电子显微镜分析显示出十聚体复合物，使 ZmNIR2 能够进行代谢以提高效率。在两种 NIR 和六种 GLN 酶中，ZmNIR2 和 ZmGLN1 是主要的 PG 定位成分，负责协调亚细胞器氮同化并决定氮利用效率。栽培种质中 ZmNIR2 剪接的遗传变异产生了一种 PG 靶向亚型 (ZmNIR2T1)，可提高 NUE。我们的工作将 PG 确立为初级氮同化的中心隔间，为开发高 NUE 作物以实现全球粮食安全提供了一种有前途的战略。

title: Radical “link-and-lose” strategies for iterative C–F functionalization of polyfluoroarenes
source: Chem
abstract: Selective activation of C–F bonds represents a long-standing challenge because of their exceptional strength and inertness. In a recent Nature Chemistry article, Wang and co-workers introduce a pyridine-boryl-radical-mediated strategy for iterative C–F bond functionalization of polyfluoroarenes. Their method enables selective transformation of the second, third, and even fourth C–F bonds and affords diverse fluorinated scaffolds of significance to medicinal chemistry.
title_zh: 多氟芳烃迭代 C-F 官能化的激进“连接和丢失”策略
abstract_zh: C-F 键的选择性活化是一个长期存在的挑战，因为它们具有非凡的强度和惰性。在最近的《自然化学》文章中，Wang 和同事介绍了一种吡啶硼基自由基介导的多氟芳烃 C-F 键迭代功能化策略。他们的方法能够选择性地转化第二个、第三个、甚至第四个 C-F 键，并提供对药物化学具有重要意义的多种氟化支架。

title: Elp3 uses a conserved molecular tunnel to transport acetate between distant active sites and catalyze tRNA wobble base modification
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The radical SAM enzyme Elp3 and eukaryotic Elongator complex catalyze formation of a key intermediate transfer RNA (tRNA) modification, 5-carboxymethyluridine (cm5U), in the anticodons of tRNAs across all domains of life. cm5U-derived modifications are important for fine tuning codon-anticodon interactions and efficient protein translation, and defects in this modification are linked to development of neurodegenerative disease in humans. Here we reconstitute tRNA modification activity with a model Elp3 enzyme and combine structural analyses, enzymology, and isotope incorporation experiments to show Elp3 harbors a conserved molecular tunnel that shuttles free acetate molecules from the acetyl-CoA binding domain to the radical SAM active site over 20 Å away, where acetate undergoes radical-mediated reaction and addition to tRNA U34. Our model explains how Elp3 bridges a large distance between active sites to catalyze tRNA carboxymethylation and illustrates a unique mechanism for intermediate transport in radical SAM enzymes.
title_zh: Elp3 使用保守的分子隧道在遥远的活性位点之间运输乙酸盐并催化 tRNA 摆动碱基修饰
abstract_zh: 自由基 SAM 酶 Elp3 和真核 Elongator 复合物催化生命所有领域 tRNA 反密码子中关键中间转移 RNA (tRNA) 修饰 5-羧甲基尿苷 (cm5U) 的形成。 cm5U 衍生的修饰对于微调密码子-反密码子相互作用和有效的蛋白质翻译非常重要，并且这种修饰的缺陷与人类神经退行性疾病的发展有关。在这里，我们用模型 Elp3 酶重建 tRNA 修饰活性，并结合结构分析、酶学和同位素掺入实验，表明 Elp3 具有保守的分子隧道，可将游离乙酸盐分子从乙酰辅酶 A 结合域穿梭到 20 Å 以外的自由基 SAM 活性位点，在此，乙酸盐经历自由基介导的反应并添加到 tRNA U34 中。我们的模型解释了 Elp3 如何桥接活性位点之间的长距离来催化 tRNA 羧甲基化，并说明了自由基 SAM 酶中中间转运的独特机制。

title: Ice-phase optothermal tweezers
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The deterministic and reconfigurable assembly of heterogeneous micro- and nanostructures remains challenging, where Brownian motion, nonspecific interfacial adsorption, and method-specific material constraints undermine precision and cross-material compatibility. Here, we present ice-phase optothermal tweezers (IOT), a platform that utilizes the ice–water interface for fast (10–100 μm/s), programmable manipulation of diverse targets, including dielectric/metal nanoparticles, proteins, DNA, and even microbubbles within ice, which have long been regarded as passive byproducts of freezing. In this scheme, the optothermally induced mobile melting zone within the ice matrix enables directed transport and nanostructure assembly with nanometer-scale resolution. We further fabricate multi-material heterostructures with tailored anisotropic and chiral optical responses, enabling applications in chiral photonics and polarization-controlled nano-optical devices under cryogenic environments. Accordingly, by unifying precise control of micro- and nano-entities across fluidic and solid-state regimes, IOT provides a general cryogenic platform for meta-structure fabrication, in-situ optical spectroscopy, and nanoparticle-interaction studies.
title_zh: 冰相光热镊子
abstract_zh: 异质微米和纳米结构的确定性和可重构组装仍然具有挑战性，其中布朗运动、非特异性界面吸附和特定方法的材料限制破坏了精度和跨材料兼容性。在这里，我们提出了冰相光热镊子（IOT），这是一个利用冰水界面对不同目标进行快速（10-100μm/s）可编程操作的平台，包括电介质/金属纳米粒子、蛋白质、DNA，甚至冰内的微气泡，这些气泡长期以来被认为是冷冻的被动副产品。在该方案中，冰基质内的光热诱导移动熔化区域能够实现具有纳米级分辨率的定向传输和纳米结构组装。我们进一步制造具有定制的各向异性和手性光学响应的​​多材料异质结构，从而能够在低温环境下应用于手性光子学和偏振控制纳米光学器件。因此，通过统一对流体和固态状态下的微米和纳米实体的精确控制，物联网为元结构制造、原位光谱学和纳米粒子相互作用研究提供了通用的低温平台。

title: Resource-state quantum RAM for fast and error-correctable queries
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Quantum devices can process data in a fundamentally different way than classical computers. To leverage this potential, many algorithms require the aid of a quantum Random Access Memory (QRAM), i.e. a module capable of efficiently loading datasets onto the quantum processor. However, a realisation of this building block is still outstanding due to its formidable resource requirements, which become even more demanding in quantum error-correction schemes. Here we show that the challenge of implementing QRAM can be entirely reduced to a state-preparation problem: since such resource-state is independent on the memory, our approach allows one to prepare it offline, opening the door to new design strategies. As an example, we introduce a heralded ‘QRAM factory’ which enables improved fidelities with high acceptance rate. More broadly, our results introduce the concept of resource-state QRAM: we study its performance in noisy settings, showing that it preserves the noise-resilience of standard QRAM, and discuss how it can be efficiently combined with quantum error-correction. Finally, we propose an implementation with neutral-atom hardware, where our analysis suggests that high-fidelity and low-latency queries can be implemented.
title_zh: 资源状态量子 RAM 用于快速且可纠错的查询
abstract_zh: 量子设备可以以与传统计算机完全不同的方式处理数据。为了利用这种潜力，许多算法需要量子随机存取存储器（QRAM）的帮助，即能够有效地将数据集加载到量子处理器上的模块。然而，由于其巨大的资源需求，该构建块的实现仍然很突出，这在量子纠错方案中变得更加苛刻。在这里，我们展示了实现 QRAM 的挑战可以完全简化为状态准备问题：由于这种资源状态独立于内存，我们的方法允许人们离线准备它，从而为新的设计策略打开了大门。例如，我们介绍了一个著名的“QRAM 工厂”，它可以提高保真度并提高接受率。更广泛地说，我们的结果引入了资源态 QRAM 的概念：我们研究了它在噪声环境中的性能，表明它保留了标准 QRAM 的噪声弹性，并讨论了如何将其与量子纠错有效地结合起来。最后，我们提出了一种使用中性原子硬件的实现，我们的分析表明可以实现高保真和低延迟的查询。

title: An efficient mid-infrared computational spectrometer based on synergistic microcavity-coupled photonic crystal waveguides
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The mid-infrared spectral region holds substantial promise for telecommunications, chemical sensing, and biomedical diagnostics applications. These fields increasingly demand high-resolution, miniaturized, and portable spectrometers. Leveraging recent advances in silicon photonics and computational reconstruction techniques, on-chip spectrometers offer a compact and lightweight solution. This paper presents a distinctive photonic spectrometer prototype based on microcavity-coupled photonic crystal waveguide (MPCW) architecture, operating at the mid-infrared region. The device achieves uniquely defined spectral responses by synergistically integrating non-uniform microcavity resonances with sharp photonics crystal band edges. Benefiting from the slow-light effect, titanium microheaters provide efficient thermal tuning, facilitating further precise spectral response control. The alternating optimization approach for spectral reconstruction eliminates the need for exhaustive parameter searches and substantially alleviates the computational burden. Thus, our MPCW spectrometer can retrieve an unknown spectrum with a resolution of 0.5 nm over a 100 nm bandwidth within several seconds, demonstrating high performance and robustness. Furthermore, the scalable nature of photonic crystal designs permits straightforward adaptation to other wavelength regimes by tailoring the MPCW dimensions.
title_zh: 基于协同微腔耦合光子晶体波导的高效中红外计算光谱仪
abstract_zh: 中红外光谱区域对于电信、化学传感和生物医学诊断应用具有巨大的前景。这些领域越来越需要高分辨率、小型化和便携式光谱仪。利用硅光子学和计算重建技术的最新进展，片上光谱仪提供了紧凑、轻便的解决方案。本文提出了一种基于微腔耦合光子晶体波导（MPCW）架构的独特光子光谱仪原型，在中红外区域工作。该器件通过将非均匀微腔谐振与尖锐的光子晶体带边缘协同集成，实现了独特定义的光谱响应。受益于慢光效应，钛微加热器提供高效的热调谐，有助于进一步精确的光谱响应控制。谱重建的交替优化方法消除了详尽的参数搜索的需要，并大大减轻了计算负担。因此，我们的 MPCW 光谱仪可以在几秒钟内在 100 nm 带宽上检索分辨率为 0.5 nm 的未知光谱，展现出高性能和鲁棒性。此外，光子晶体设计的可扩展性允许通过定制 MPCW 尺寸来直接适应其他波长范围。

title: Staged investments in carbon abatement technologies under a phased emission trading scheme: A real options analysis
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Applied Energy

title: High encoding-sensitivity vision sensor with complementary nonlinear neuromorphic computing
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Building a neuromorphic vision sensor capable of signal processing and spike generation is essential for developing hardware tailored to brain-inspired spiking neural networks. A critical challenge, however, is the constrained adaptive sensitivity when dealing with expanding ranges of light intensity. Here we show a neuromorphic vision sensor built on a one-transistor-one-memristor pixel structure, attaining high encoding-sensitivity over a broad intensity range by fusing complementary superlinear and sublinear encoding. Specifically, the superlinear intensity-to-spike firing is based on the plasmonic volatile Ag/hBN/Au memristor, which has the high time-to-first-spike (TTFS)- and rate- encoding sensitivity in high-brightness. And the sublinear firing behavior is based on the MoS2 synaptic photodetector and volatile Ag/hBN/Au memristor neuron, which has the high TTFS- and rate- encoding sensitivity in dim light. When deployed in polar environments (intense brightness to darkness), the complementary vision sensor achieves high-quality imaging, segmenting ice/land regions and predicting thickness—showcasing its robustness under challenging conditions.
title_zh: 具有互补非线性神经形态计算的高编码灵敏度视觉传感器
abstract_zh: 构建能够进行信号处理和尖峰生成的神经形态视觉传感器对于开发适合大脑启发尖峰神经网络的硬件至关重要。然而，一个关键的挑战是在处理不断扩大的光强度范围时，自适应灵敏度受到限制。在这里，我们展示了一种基于单晶体管一忆阻器像素结构构建的神经形态视觉传感器，通过融合互补的超线性和亚线性编码，在较宽的强度范围内获得高编码灵敏度。具体来说，超线性脉冲强度发射基于等离子体挥发性Ag/hBN/Au忆阻器，该忆阻器在高亮度下具有高首次脉冲时间（TTFS）和速率编码灵敏度。亚线性放电行为基于 MoS2 突触光电探测器和挥发性 Ag/hBN/Au 忆阻神经元，在弱光下具有高 TTFS 和速率编码灵敏度。当部署在极地环境（强亮度到黑暗）时，互补视觉传感器可实现高质量成像、分割冰/陆地区域并预测厚度，展示其在挑战性条件下的稳健性。

title: Multimodal control of Cas13d activity through domain insertion at an allosteric hotspot
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: CRISPR-Cas13d RNA nucleases are powerful tools for programmable RNA targeting. A light-controlled RNA nuclease could be transformative by enabling researchers to selectively knock down transcripts at desired positions in a cell or tissue or at timepoints of interest. Here, we develop a set of RfxCas13d tools that can be multimodally controlled by either light or small molecule addition. By screening an RfxCas13d library containing insertions of the AsLOV2 photoswitchable domain, we identify an OptoCas13d-off variant that induced target RNA cleavage in the dark and switched to an inactive state under blue light. We show that the same allosteric hotspot can be exploited to generate an OptoCas13d-on with an inverted light response and a ChemoCas13d that is activated by rapamycin analogs, enabling knockdown of endogenous mRNA and protein targets. Overall, our study shows that engineered allostery can produce stimulus-controlled Cas13d variants to modulate RNA with high spatial and temporal precision.
title_zh: 通过在变构热点插入结构域对 Cas13d 活性进行多模式控制
abstract_zh: CRISPR-Cas13d RNA 核酸酶是用于可编程 RNA 靶向的强大工具。光控RNA核酸酶可以使研究人员在细胞或组织中的所需位置或感兴趣的时间点选择性地敲低转录本，从而具有变革性。在这里，我们开发了一套 RfxCas13d 工具，可以通过轻分子或小分子添加进行多模式控制。通过筛选包含 AsLOV2 光开关结构域插入的 RfxCas13d 文库，我们鉴定了一种 OptoCas13d-off 变体，该变体在黑暗中诱导靶标 RNA 裂解，并在蓝光下切换至非活性状态。我们表明，可以利用相同的变构热点来生成具有反向光响应的 OptoCas13d-on 和由雷帕霉素类似物激活的 ChemoCas13d，从而能够敲低内源 mRNA 和蛋白质靶标。总体而言，我们的研究表明，工程变构可以产生刺激控制的 Cas13d 变体，以高空间和时间精度调节 RNA。

title: Spermine is an endogenous iron chelator that inhibits ferroptosis
source: Nature
abstract: Ferroptosis is an iron-dependent form of cell death driven by lipid peroxidation1. Here we identify spermine—a polyamine derived from spermidine2—as an endogenous iron chelator that directly suppresses ferroptosis. Integrating metabolomics, stable isotope tracing and biophysical studies of the interaction between spermine and Fe2+ ions, we demonstrate that aldehyde dehydrogenase 18 family member A1 (ALDH18A1) promotes an alternative glutamine-dependent pathway for de novo spermine synthesis. This process limits iron availability and lipid peroxidation in hepatocellular carcinoma. Genetic or pharmacological inhibition of ALDH18A1—through knockout, short hairpin RNA delivered using adeno-associated virus (AAV), or the small molecule inhibitor YG1702—triggers ferroptosis and impairs both spontaneous and chemically induced hepatocarcinogenesis. Conversely, supplementation of spermine protects against ferroptosis-associated ischaemia–reperfusion injury across multiple tissues, including the liver, intestine and kidneys. These findings uncover a pathophysiologically relevant metabolic circuit in which spermine-mediated iron chelation suppresses ferroptosis.
title_zh: 精胺是一种内源性铁螯合剂，可抑制铁死亡
abstract_zh: 铁死亡是一种由脂质过氧化驱动的铁依赖性细胞死亡形式1。在这里，我们将精胺（一种源自亚精胺2的多胺）确定为一种直接抑制铁死亡的内源性铁螯合剂。综合代谢组学、稳定同位素示踪和精胺与 Fe2+ 离子之间相互作用的生物物理研究，我们证明乙醛脱氢酶 18 家族成员 A1 (ALDH18A1) 促进精胺从头合成的替代谷氨酰胺依赖性途径。这一过程限制了肝细胞癌中铁的利用率和脂质过氧化。 ALDH18A1 的遗传或药理学抑制（通过使用腺相关病毒 (AAV) 或小分子抑制剂 YG1702 传递的敲除、短发夹 RNA）触发铁死亡并损害自发性和化学诱导的肝癌发生。相反，补充精胺可以防止铁死亡相关的多个组织（包括肝脏、肠和肾脏）的缺血再灌注损伤。这些发现揭示了一个病理生理学相关的代谢回路，其中精胺介导的铁螯合抑制铁死亡。
